blended.narrative: Eldora is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,167 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

Tomorrow: 2.7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: clear skies, highs of 44°F, winds around 24 mph.
